_description: 3-step random battlefield generation. Step 1: Ground type. Step 2: Organize table into clusters (12 inch square, 9 clusters in 3x3 foot table). Step 3: Primary terrain per cluster + sub-features. Map adjustments: if sector has characteristic terrain, center cluster features it.

entries.name: Alien surface such as remnant construction

randomize_count.description: If negative, reduce total clusters by this amount.

entries.name: Alien ruin
entries.description: Remains of an ancient alien construction.

entries.name: Wreckage
entries.description: Shuttle crash site, overgrown alien ship wreckage.

entries.name: Foliage
entries.description: Tall bushes, forest.

entries.name: High ground
entries.description: Hills, dunes, or other raised ground.

entries.name: Liquid
entries.description: Streams, lakes, or swamp. Can be water or other liquids.

entries.name: Boulders
entries.description: Large rock formations.

entries.name: Rough ground
entries.description: Broken ground with many rocks or other hindrances.

entries.name: Facility
entries.description: Colony structure such as a habitation shelter or mining drill.

entries.name: Open ground
entries.description: Fairly open ground with a few scatter features.

entries.name: Dense terrain
entries.description: Dense mass of forest, rocks, or other obscuring terrain.

step_4_cluster_sub_feature._note: Roll for clusters with open space remaining. Completely filled clusters skip this step.

entries.name: None
entries.description: No additional feature is present.

entries.name: Crystals
entries.description: Man-sized crystals.

entries.name: Probe
entries.description: The wreck of a probe, drone or similar.

entries.name: Bushes
entries.description: Some shrubs or bushes.

entries.name: Rocks
entries.description: A few big rocks.

entries.name: Trees
entries.description: A few single trees.

entries.name: Puddle
entries.description: A small liquid feature.

entries.name: Crater
entries.description: A crater from a meteor strike.

entries.name: Hedge
entries.description: Plants forming a natural barrier.

entries.name: Sign
entries.description: Sign placed by colony scout.

entries.name: Peculiar item
entries.description: Something strange and inexplicable. Be creative!

entries.name: Remnants
entries.description: Animal carcass or bones.

map_adjustments.description: If your location on the world map is characterized by a particular terrain type, one cluster at the center of the table will always feature that terrain type.
